https://jira.onap.org/browse/INT-1355
Please note that this use case is leveraging oclip (it would be a new testing framework integrated in the gate, if I can finalize it, with potentially new test suites for Guilin and beyond (OVP?))

WIP with Liping

Patch Set 1:

@Morgan, in our ONAP Installation (oom_postconfigure) we are using ESR server API to get the existing VIMs and add the VIM to AAI/ESR. 
In onap_tests we don't use ESR as such and we don't test the ESR UI.

https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation/-/blob/master/roles/oom_postconfigure/tasks/main.yaml

Hi,Jimmy, I committed  the  modification of ESR-GUI ,Maybe it the reason the ESR-GUI could not be accessed .Please help to review it ,Thanks.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Good morning,
I rechecked the ESR UI version in my Daily Master.
Up to now I updated the ESR image container within the pod using "kubectl edit pod...".
This was not successful, as I reported beforehand.
Now I restarted the pod after the version update.
This fixes the issue and the UI is accessable again.
So I will vote to merge the fix !!

Sorry for the troubles...
Andreas

Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

Sorry for the previous positive comments,
the restart of the pod enabled the old UI image version (1.4.0).
I will now test it by updating the helm chart.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Good morning Morgan,

unfortunately no good news, as you might not seen my latest comments.
The restart of the pod changed the version back to 1.4.0, that was the reason for the successful test.
I now changed the version in the helm chart and made a "helm upgrade".
Unfortunately the problem with the UI is not fixed.

Best regards
Andreas
